__doc__: Layer 4: Chaos Routing & Control — mitigation mode selection, policy enforcement
name: ChaosOS :: Layer 4 — Chaos Routing & Control

execution_sequence.name: Apply SILENT_CHAOS_MODE (log only)
execution_sequence.command: echo '[ChaosOS] Mode: {{CHAOS_MODE}}'; echo '[ChaosOS] full_destruction_enabled: {{FULL_DESTRUCTION}}'; echo '[ChaosOS] panic_limit: {{MAX_PANICS_PER_HOUR}}/hr'; dmesg --read-clear 2>/dev/null | grep -iE '(panic|oops|bug)' | tail -5 >> {{LOG_DIR}}/panic.log && echo 'panic log updated' || echo 'dmesg clear skipped'

execution_sequence.name: Enforce data loss guard
execution_sequence.command: sync && echo '[ChaosOS] data_loss_guard: ACTIVE — buffers flushed'

execution_sequence.name: Kill zombie processes
execution_sequence.command: ZOMBIES=$(ps aux | awk '$8=="Z"{print $2}'); if [ -n "$ZOMBIES" ]; then echo "Signaling zombie parents..."; for z in $ZOMBIES; do kill -SIGCHLD $(ps -o ppid= -p $z 2>/dev/null) 2>/dev/null; done; echo "done"; else echo 'NO_ZOMBIES'; fi
